advancements.forcemaster_rpg.equipment.p: Obtain the full Phasleb Armor Set
advancements.forcemaster_rpg.spell_cast_: Use a skill from the Force Mastery Book
effect.forcemaster_rpg.nen_focus.descrip: You can now stack Arcane Overflow with melee attacks.
item.forcemaster_rpg.forcemaster_spell_b:
Spell Book of Forcemasters, using martial weapons, the knuckle. Dealing melee and arcane damage with the power of the force.
- Strengths: Fast attacks dealing physical and magical damage.
- Weaknesses: Ranged Enemies
- Equipment: Light Armor
spell.forcemaster_rpg.asal.description: A devastating charged strike that deals massive {damage_1} arcane & {damage_2} physical-damage. Consumes Arcane Overflow and exhausts the caster.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.asal.name: Asalraalaikum
spell.forcemaster_rpg.belial_smashing.de: Charges to the targets direction, and dealing arcane {damage_1} & {damage_2} physical-damage.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.burstcrack.descrip: Unleashes a shockwave around you, knocking up enemies and dealing {damage} arcane and physical damage.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.burstcrack.name: Burstcrack
spell.forcemaster_rpg.improved_burstcrac: Increases the range of Burstcrack by {range_add}
spell.forcemaster_rpg.knuckle_arcane_ove: Casting Forcemaster Spells stacks Arcane Overflow for {effect_duration} sec.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.knuckle_knockup.de: Hitting enemies has a {trigger_chance} chance to knock up the target.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.nen_focus.descript: Defeating enemies with Forcemaster Spells grants Nen Focus effect, stacking Arcane Overflow with melee attacks up to {effect_amplifier_cap} times, lasting {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.nen_focus.name: Nen Focus
spell.forcemaster_rpg.stonehand.descript: {trigger_chance_1} chance for {stash_duration} seconds to stun targets on damage, only with fist weapons.
spell.forcemaster_rpg.stonehand.name: Stonehand
